title: A1 Básico - Inicial
intro: The student is at an initial stage of exposure to the Portuguese language. They understand very simple words and expressions, mainly with visual or gestural support, and have difficulty identifying the topic or main information. Oral interaction is very limited, relying on isolated words or basic expressions to meet immediate needs. Written production is limited to single words or very simple sentences, with frequent grammatical errors and strong influence from their first language. Vocabulary is limited and repetitive, requiring ongoing support for communication.
objectives: Present tense verbs in common contexts
Introduction to Portuguese culture and traditions
